use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH NONCIRRHOTIC NONALCOHOLIC STEATOHEPATITIS (NASH) WITH MODERATE TO ADVANCED LIVER FIBROSIS (CONSISTENT WITH STAGES F2 TO F3 FIBROSIS)

indications.text:
REZDIFFRA is indicated in conjunction with diet and exercise for the treatment of adults with
noncirrhotic nonalcoholic steatohepatitis (NASH) with moderate to advanced liver fibrosis (consistent
with stages F2 to F3 fibrosis).
This indication is approved under accelerated approval based on improvem...
